Greyelm Industries SE — Privacy & Transfer Workflow Notice (EU)
Scope: EU issuer listed on the Nordland Exchange MTF; processing under GDPR, including Art 9 where applicable, and CSRD/SFDR reporting; MAR obligations for insider lists.
Contacts: Data Protection Officer, dpo@greyelm.example; helpline +800 000 0000 (public, non-personal).
Identifiers we may receive in DSARs: role emails, employee codes, and, where strictly necessary for verification, Valoria passport number VLR0A0000 (example only).
We avoid collecting special categories unless Art 9(2)(b)–(g) apply; CSRD/SFDR data are aggregated at facility-level or product umbrella level, not per individual.
Corporate identifiers for the issuer may appear: Trade Register No EU-CBR-00998877 (illustrative), VAT VLTN-000000000 (checksum not validated), and test IBAN XE68 1234 5678 9012 3456 78.
Submission forms use placeholders only: <Full Name>, <Home Address>, <Account Number>, and are not evidence of collection until provided by you.
For MAR workflows, insider lists are maintained with role titles only (e.g., “Head of Compliance”) and we avoid including price-sensitive details in this notice; stale, already-announced facts are not MNPI.
Cross-border transfers: limited personal data may be sent to Datacove Processing Kft. (processor) in the Lysander Republic (no adequacy decision) under SCCs Module 2 with supplementary encryption.
Supervisory oversight: competent authority is the EMOD (European Markets Oversight Directorate) and the Valoria Data Protection Inspectorate; disputes follow EU representative procedure.
Data retention: DSAR evidence (e.g., copy of identification) is deleted within 30 days post-verification; logs with only system identifiers are kept for 12 months.
We do not request your bank details by phone; any reference to account patterns like IBAN XE00 0000 0000 0000 0000 00 in emails is a template example.
Public contact points are department mailboxes only (privacy@greyelm.example; compliance@greyelm.example); do not send sensitive documents to sales@greyelm.example.
This notice is not an investment communication and contains no information reasonably expected to affect the price of Greyelm securities.
